catalogData.name: Protection
properties: Physical, Acid, Cold, Electricity, and Fire Resistance
Unphased (can't gain Frightened or Wounded status)

powers.name: Abjure
powers.raw: Abjure (Complex Action, Sustained): (Force) targets gain +Force/3 on resistance tests against magical effects
powers.text: (Force) targets gain +Force/3 on resistance tests against magical effects

powers.name: Animal Form
powers.raw: Animal Form (Major Action, Sustained): Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.
powers.text: Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.

powers.name: Barrier
powers.raw: Barrier (Complex Action, Sustained 1 hour): Create dome of Mana Barrier and Wall spell with (Force)m radius
powers.text: Create dome of Mana Barrier and Wall spell with (Force)m radius

powers.name: Cast Spell
powers.raw: Cast Spell (Complex Action): Cast Punch at Force/2

powers.name: Obscure Auras
powers.raw: Obscure Auras (Complex Action, Sustained): Hide targets from magical detection. Resist: WIL+INT
powers.text: Hide targets from magical detection. Resist: WIL+INT

powers.name: Primary Spell
powers.raw: Primary Spell (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Force Field at Force

powers.name: Sacrifice
powers.raw: Sacrifice (Complex Action, Sustained): Target transfers (Force) damage to spirit when taking damage
powers.text: Target transfers (Force) damage to spirit when taking damage

greatFormPowers.name: Restrain
greatFormPowers.raw: Restrain (Complex Action): Cast Paralyze at Force, don't sustain. Ends if target takes damage.
greatFormPowers.text: Cast Paralyze at Force, don't sustain. Ends if target takes damage.
